user_story: Visitor lands on the homepage to understand Jovie and start signup
expected_behavior: Static homepage renders the enabled homepage design, visible conversion actions, enabled marketing sections, and safe public navigation.
suggested_test: pnpm --filter @jovie/web exec playwright test apps/web/tests/e2e/homepage.spec.ts apps/web/tests/e2e/smoke-public.spec.ts
errors_found: JOV-3378: local homepage QA is blocked. Skip-warmup smoke exited 0 but skipped the homepage after its timeout path. No-skip browser check against dev:local:playwright on :3101 failed with ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE after the server crashed with esbuild fatal error: all goroutines are asleep - deadlock. No-skip browser check against dev:fast/Turbopack on :3101 timed out waiting for domcontentloaded after 180s; curl to / timed out after 120s with status=000.
notes: Public traffic tier 1. Machine had many long-lived Next/esbuild processes active; isolate server or preview deployment before classifying as product UX regression.

user_story: Creator or admin opens admin entry
expected_behavior: Non-admin users redirect safely; admins enter admin ops path.
